summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CRUD functionality for all views in PDS Sistema. All 29 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including login, navigation, CRUD modals for Productos, Ventas, Compras, Clientes, Proveedores, Gastos, and Usuarios. 'Made with Emergent' badge confirmed removed from index.html.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic issue, charts display correctly after resize

passed_tests: No 'Made with Emergent' badge visible on any page
All 12 navigation items work correctly (dashboard, estadisticas, productos, ventas, compras, clientes, proveedores, gastos, reportes, stock-historial, usuarios, auditoria)
Productos: 'Nuevo Producto' button visible and opens modal with all fields (codigo, nombre, variante, categoria, costo, precio, stock, stock_minimo)
Productos: Edit button (pencil icon) opens edit modal with pre-filled data
Productos: Ajustar Stock button opens stock adjustment modal
Ventas: 'Nueva Venta' button opens modal with client selector, product selector
Compras: 'Nueva Compra' button opens modal with provider selector, product selector, factura field
Clientes: 'Nuevo Cliente' button opens modal, edit/delete buttons work
Proveedores: 'Nuevo Proveedor' button opens modal, edit/delete buttons work
Gastos: 'Nuevo Gasto' button opens form with fecha, categoria, descripcion, monto
Usuarios: 'Nuevo Usuario' button opens form with email, nombre, password, role selector
Usuarios: Activate/Deactivate toggle buttons visible (7 found)
Backend API: POST /api/ventas - 200 OK (creates sale and adjusts stock)
Backend API: POST /api/compras - 200 OK (creates purchase and adds stock)
Backend API: PUT /api/usuarios/{id} - 200 OK (toggle active status)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed data during backend testing (products, clients, providers, users, expenses)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRUD functionality tested and working. Productos has full CRUD with stock adjustment. Ventas creates sales and reduces stock. Compras creates purchases and adds stock. Clientes, Proveedores, Gastos, Usuarios all have working create/edit/delete. Navigation works for all 12 sidebar items. No 'Made with Emergent' badge present. Previous iterations tested auth, dashboard widgets, metas, shared templates - all remain stable.
